name: sidebar-layout
title: Sidebar Layout
description: A sidebar-based layout with configurable navigation groups, a brand header, page header component, locale toggle, and user button.
docs:
## Overview

`sidebar-layout` provides a sidebar-based layout for applications using TanStack Router. It includes a configurable sidebar with brand header and navigation groups, a page header component with badges and actions, and a locale toggle in the top bar.

## Features

- Configurable sidebar with brand header and grouped navigation
- Active link detection via TanStack Router
- Collapsible icon sidebar with `SidebarProvider`
- `SidebarPageHeader` with optional badge, description, and actions
- Customizable header end content (defaults to `LocaleToggle` and `UserButton`)
- Uses `Outlet` or `children` for content rendering

## Usage

```tsx
import { SidebarLayout, SidebarPageHeader, type NavGroup } from "@/components/sidebar-layout";
import { LayoutDashboard, Users } from "lucide-react";

const brand = {
  label: () => "My App",
  subtitle: () => "Admin Panel",
  icon: LayoutDashboard,
  href: "/admin",
};

const groups: NavGroup[] = [
  {
    label: () => "Navigation",
    items: [
      { label: () => "Dashboard", href: "/admin", icon: LayoutDashboard },
      { label: () => "Users", href: "/admin/users", icon: Users },
    ],
  },
];

<SidebarLayout brand={brand} groups={groups} />
```

For pages with custom content:

```tsx
<SidebarLayout brand={brand} groups={groups}>
  <SidebarPageHeader title="Users" description="Manage users" />
</SidebarLayout>
```
